props.name: as
props.description: Allows specifying the type of the parent component to be rendered.

props.name: className
props.description: Allows adding custom classes to the component.

props.name: color
props.description: Changes the main color of the border (fades to transparent)

props.name: speed
props.description: Changes the speed of the animation.

props.name: thickness
props.description: Controls the thickness of the star border effect.
